org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.SecretBackendMetadata

Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.vault.config
Core Vault support classes.
org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.aws
AWS integration with Vault.
org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.consul
Consul integration with Vault.
org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.databases
Database integration with Vault.
org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.rabbitmq
RabbitMQ integration with Vault.

    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    LeasingSecretBackendMetadata
    Lease extension to SecretBackendMetadata providing a lease mode.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    KeyValueSecretBackendMetadata
    SecretBackendMetadata for the kv (key-value) secret backend.
    class 
    SecretBackendMetadataSupport
    Support class for SecretBackendMetadata implementations.
    class 
    SecretBackendMetadataWrapper
    Provides a convenient implementation of the SecretBackendMetadata interface that can be subclassed to override specific methods.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static SecretBackendMetadata
    KeyValueSecretBackendMetadata.create(String path)
    Create a SecretBackendMetadata for the kv secret backend given a path.
    static SecretBackendMetadata
    KeyValueSecretBackendMetadata.create(String secretBackendPath, String key)
    Create a SecretBackendMetadata for the kv secret backend given a secretBackendPath and key.
    static SecretBackendMetadata
    KeyValueSecretBackendMetadata.create(String path, org.springframework.vault.core.util.PropertyTransformer propertyTransformer)
    Create a SecretBackendMetadata for the kv secret backend given a path.
    SecretBackendMetadata
    SecretBackendMetadataFactory.createMetadata(T backendDescriptor)
    Converts a VaultSecretBackendDescriptor into a SecretBackendMetadata.
    SecretBackendMetadata
    VaultConfigLocation.getSecretBackendMetadata()

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection<SecretBackendMetadata>
    PropertySourceLocatorConfiguration.getSecretBackends()
    Return a Collection of SecretBackendMetadata to be instantiated as PropertySource.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SecretBackendConfigurer
    SecretBackendConfigurer.add(SecretBackendMetadata metadata)
    Add a SecretBackendMetadata.

    Create VaultPropertySource initialized with a SecretBackendMetadata .
    Secrets
    VaultConfigOperations.read(SecretBackendMetadata secretBackendMetadata)
    Read secrets from a secret backend encapsulated within a SecretBackendMetadata.
